subcodes.first_line: We have indeed hearkened unto thy call and beheld thy turning unto the Supreme Horizon, and We have answered thee with that which beareth the fragrance of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد سمعنا ندائک و راینا اقبالک الی الافق الاعلی و اجبناک بما تضوع به عرف الله
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
